name: Ripe Plum Filling for Pierogies
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the plum and remove the pit.
2. Fill a bowl with sugar and ground cinnamon.
3. Add the plums to the sugar mixture.
4. Roll out dough into thin sheets.
5. Place a portion of the plum filling in the center of each sheet.
6. Brush edges with beaten egg white.
7. Cover with more dough, sealing the edges.
8. Serve with whipped cream.
